rationale: Review 1 catches a real reuse issue confirmed in the diff: several generally useful lemmas (`BialgHom.map_antipode`, tensor-product `map_id`/`map_comp`, and `antipode_comp`) are `private`, so downstream TauCeti code cannot reuse them. Some duplicate-specialization advice is debatable because base-change-specific simp API can be useful, but acting on the decisive private-helper finding would lead to a better PR than Review 2's no-op approval.
